#+TITLE: <task title>
#+TODO: PLANNING(p!) ITERATING(i!) MERGING(m!) | COMPLETE(c!) DROPPED(x@)
#+STARTUP: overview logdrawer

# To start a task:
#   cp tasks/TEMPLATE.org tasks/active/$(date +%F)-<slug>.org
# Then fill in the title, properties, and goal. Initial state is
# PLANNING with the :user: tag - the task is waiting for the user to
# give the planning prompt.
#
# Heading tags indicate who currently has the ball:
#   :agent:    the agent is working autonomously
#   :user:     the ball is in the user's court
#   :blocked:  waiting on something external (peer review, external CI, etc.)

* PLANNING <task title>                                               :user:
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID:       <YYYY-MM-DD-slug>
  :REPO:     https://github.com/<org>/<repo>
  :BRANCH:
  :WORKTREE:
  :PR:
  :AGENT:
  :END:

** Goal
   What "done" looks like, in one or two sentences.

** Context
   Why this task exists - background, motivating incident, or constraint
   that wouldn't be obvious from the goal alone. Skip if the goal is
   self-explanatory.

** Acceptance criteria
   - [ ]
   - [ ]

** Notes
   Free-form scratch space. State transitions are logged automatically
   in the LOGBOOK drawer below the heading - prose history doesn't need
   to live here.

# Local Variables:
# eval: (auto-revert-mode 1)
# End:
